mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 50k signals weakening labor market conditions that increase recession risk, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS declines exceed 50k.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real consumer spending (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 70% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 1.5% signals strengthening supply-side capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days due to inflationary pressures.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO growth exceeds 1.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL reading above 3% triggers central bank tightening expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 3%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate (UNRATE) decline below 3.5% signals tight labor market conditions that drive corporate profit growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) decline below 1% indicates weakening economic momentum, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 declines below 1%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) signal weakening supply-side activity, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline of INDPRO and HOUST fails to produce negative 20d returns in > 70% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.5.
